collectors.title: Database
collectors.titleDetails: (3 total Queries, 3 of them unique across 1 Connection)

queries.sql: SELECT `transaksi`.*, `users`.`username`, `books`.`title` FROM `transaksi` JOIN `users` ON `users`.`id` = `transaksi`.`user_id` JOIN `books` ON `books`.`id` = `transaksi`.`book_id` ORDER BY CASE WHEN transaksi.status = 'Dipinjam' THEN 1 WHEN transaksi.status = 'Kembali' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END ASC, `transaksi`.`created_at` DESC

timelineData.name: Query
timelineData.query: SELECT `transaksi`.*, `users`.`username`, `books`.`title` FROM `transaksi` JOIN `users` ON `users`.`id` = `transaksi`.`user_id` JOIN `books` ON `books`.`id` = `transaksi`.`book_id` ORDER BY CASE WHEN transaksi.status = 'Dipinjam' THEN 1 WHEN transaksi.status = 'Kembali' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END ASC, `transaksi`.`created_at` DESC
